channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common pesticide linked to hidden brain damage, scientists warn
item.description: Scientists found alarming evidence that a common insecticide may cause lasting brain damage before birth.

item.title: Childhood junk food may rewire the brain for life
item.description: Eating junk food early in life may rewire the brain permanently, even after switching to a healthy diet.

item.title: Jupiter's lightning may be 100 times more powerful than Earth's
item.description: Using NASA's Juno spacecraft, scientists discovered that Jupiter's storms produce lightning far more powerful than any on Earth.

item.title: Physicists finally solve the strange mystery of 'breathing' lasers
item.description: Scientists have solved the puzzle of 'breather' laser pulses, a phenomenon that had baffled laser physicists for years.
